programme.title: Goals of the 1990s
programme.desc: Goals of the 1990s (ITV Sport Standby Filler 2026): A look back at some memorable goals from the 1990s.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: High-kicking sci-fi action-adventure film starring Jean-Claude Van Damme and Dolph Lundgren, 1992. Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived in a secret government project.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: High-kicking sci-fi action-adventure film starring Jean-Claude Van Damme and Dolph Lundgren, 1992. Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived in a secret government project.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. Arthur is only too willing to help when a local tramp comes into an inheritance.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: US sitcom about a bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. Alan's divorce settlement is put in peril by Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: My Doctor Has A Cow Puppet: US sitcom about a bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in. Charlie attempts to cure Alan of his tendency to sleepwalk.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Racehorses
programme.desc: From Nijinsky to Tiger Roll, Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era - enjoy Best Mate's third Gold Cup and Shergar racing to Derby glory.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Europe-based adventure series. The wife of a president hires the Protectors to guard her critically-ill husband when she fears he may be kidnapped.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from across the Football League, including Portsmouth v Ipswich in the Championship, and Bolton v Stevenage, Huddersfield v Cardiff and Port Vale v Barnsley in League One.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly: Featuring George Best, Zaire at the World Cup, and a few funny own goals.

programme.title: Plato Racing: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Plato Racing: All or Nothing: Going behind the scenes with Team Plato ahead of the new BTCC season.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Live
programme.desc: Nicki Shields presents live coverage of the first weekend of the 2026 British Touring Car Championship season at Donington Park.

programme.title: British Touring Car Crashes and Smashes
programme.desc: A short sports film depicting extraordinary British Touring Car crashes and smashes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The very first episode of the US documentary series. Salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz purchase a Japanese sword and visit a reluctant seller with 12 packed barns.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Thrilling action-adventure film based on the TV series of the same name and starring Ralph Fiennes and Uma Thurman, 1998. Two British agents hunt for a weather-changing machine.

programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Thrilling action-adventure film based on the TV series of the same name and starring Ralph Fiennes and Uma Thurman, 1998. Two British agents hunt for a weather-changing machine.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Cult horror comedy film starring Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward, 1990. A small US town is terrorised by strange subterranean creatures who are killing the town's residents one by one.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Cult horror comedy film starring Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward, 1990. A small US town is terrorised by strange subterranean creatures who are killing the town's residents one by one.

programme.title: Black Sails
programme.desc: Swashbuckling action-adventure drama. Silver gives Captain Flint the last details of the schedule with the location of the ship, and Eleanor's situation is changed abruptly.

programme.title: Lost Car Rescue
programme.desc: Reality series following an ambitious team of classic car hunters. Matt's team turns west on a mission to uncover iconic pieces from Canada's Gold Rush era.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: George Carter's wife Alison is mistaken for a fellow teacher with dubious connections and is killed by a hired assassin.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: TC learns that his daughter Melody has been abducted and decides that he has no choice but to sell his business to pay for her return.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The Queen of Hearts is Wild: Classic US detective drama. A woman is the only witness to the murder of a police officer, but her gangster boyfriend is an old enemy of Theo.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint investigates allegations that the Loch Ness Monster is killing people.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken is on the brink of quitting the security business after dealing with a messy adultery case so Harry sends him to a rural retreat.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Haskins is framed for corruption while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins. Is there a connection.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The qualifying rounds culminate with four must-win match-ups providing the final spots in the World Championship tournament.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Carol asks Thomas to investigate her mentor Judge Hannibal Kerns as she is convinced that he is being bribed to dismiss cases.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. An emotionally disturbed taxi driver becomes obsessed with a radio talk show host and starts to stalk and murder her subjects.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Action drama series. The Saint is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting, but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken investigates the case of a larger than life businessman who is accused of kidnapping a young child.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Violent criminal Vic Labbett returns to England to recover the proceeds of an earlier robbery, and Regan and Carter must stop him before he can get his hands on the loot.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his right-hand man. A reformed gambler dies owing Arthur money, but a religious miracle seems to offer compensation.

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora head to the mighty Iktus in France for the first part of a two-part mission to catch a koi each and a team carp of 50 pounds or more.
